summary: Post-purchase fulfillment fix verified. All 32 tests passed. Key functions tested: normalize_product_id(), resolve_display_name_to_product_id(), resolve_item_to_file_entries(), and BUNDLE_EXPANSIONS. The fix correctly resolves display names like 'Holiday Series - The Covenant - ADULT (99% off)' to valid PRODUCT_FILES keys.
critical_code_review_comments: payment_routes.py lines 296-312: _strip_display_noise() correctly strips discount labels (99% off), pre-order tags, ship notes, and em-dash suffixes
payment_routes.py lines 315-430: resolve_display_name_to_product_id() handles Holiday/Breakfast series, nibbles, snack packs, game passes, and subscriptions
payment_routes.py lines 433-511: normalize_product_id() tries multiple resolution strategies: direct lookup, lowercase, underscore conversion, prefix stripping, display name resolution
payment_routes.py lines 514-522: BUNDLE_EXPANSIONS correctly maps starter-bundle-4cs-bkft-ae to ['holiday_ae', 'breakfast_ae_digital']

payment_routes.py lines 525-577: resolve_item_to_file_entries() is the main fulfillment resolver - handles normalized_product_id field, display names, bundles, and returns empty list for game passes/subscriptions
seed_data_creation: None - used existing product catalog and direct function imports
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fulfillment fix fully tested. Key verified behaviors: (1) Display names with discounts like 'Holiday Series - The Covenant - ADULT (99% off)' resolve to valid PRODUCT_FILES keys. (2) Internal IDs like holiday_ae, breakfast_ae_digital work directly. (3) Bundle starter-bundle-4cs-bkft-ae expands to holiday_ae AND breakfast_ae_digital. (4) Game passes and subscriptions correctly return empty list (no downloadable file). (5) POST /api/downloads/resend-links endpoint responds correctly (429 when no links found, not 500). (6) POST /api/payments/checkout/cart accepts items with display names.

normalize_product_id_display_names.details: Resolves 'Holiday Series - The Covenant - ADULT (99% off)' to valid PRODUCT_FILES key

normalize_product_id_holiday_digital_adu.details: Resolves 'Full Workbooks - Holiday Digital (Adult) (15% off)' to holiday_ae

normalize_product_id_breakfast_ae_digita.details: Resolves 'Full Workbooks - Break*fast AE Digital - ADULT' to breakfast_ae_digital

normalize_product_id_breakfast_paperback.details: Resolves 'Full Workbooks - Break*fast Paperback (Youth)' to breakfast_ye variant

normalize_product_id_internal_ids.details: Internal IDs holiday_ae, breakfast_ae_digital, breakfast-snack-month-1-adult-interactive resolve correctly

bundle_expansion_starter_bundle.details: starter-bundle-4cs-bkft-ae expands to holiday_ae AND breakfast_ae_digital (2 entries)

game_passes_return_empty_list.details: game_pass_30 and game_pass_90 return empty list from resolve_item_to_file_entries (expected - no downloadable file)

subscriptions_return_empty_list.details: subscription_ae_monthly returns empty list (expected - no downloadable file)

resend_links_endpoint_not_500.details: POST /api/downloads/resend-links returns 429 (rate limit/no links) not 500 error

checkout_cart_stores_items.details: POST /api/payments/checkout/cart accepts items with display names and creates Stripe session

backend_starts_without_errors.details: Backend responds to /api/ with Soul Food API message

mocked_apis.none: Stripe is live mode - real sessions created (not completed). Direct function imports used for unit tests.
